docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY KRIER, COURTNEY AS TO DEFENDANT CARLSON, JOSEPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-01-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-01-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-01-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KRIER, COURTNEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARLSON, JOSEPH $650.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $725.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2008 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-15-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CARLSON, JOSEPH
